items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a lot of submission victories on his record.
items.quote: he's got a lot of submission victories.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a very bad takedown accuracy.
items.quote: he has a very, very bad takedown accuracy.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is a bit small for the weight class and may struggle to make 125 pounds.
items.quote: I really wonder if there's any chance at all that this guy could make 125 lbs because I do think he's a bit small for this weight class.

items.claim: Mike Davis is a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu.
items.quote: He's a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu.
sometimes he looks a lot better than he does and then sometimes he has some really bad performances

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev has a pretty sneaky and good jab.
items.quote: Ali's best part of his game is actually the jab which is pretty sneaky.

items.claim: Mike Davis is the better striker in the matchup against Nurullo Aliev.
items.quote: I would argue Davis is the better um striker in the matchup.

items.claim: Mike Davis is better at pure Brazilian jiu-jitsu than Nurullo Aliev.
items.quote: I would argue that Davis like when it comes to the pure BJJ is better too.

items.claim: Tuchilov is the better of the two debuting fighters at light heavyweight compared to Brenson Rivero.
items.quote: Out of the two guys that are debuting at light heavyweight on this card, I actually do think Tuchilov is the better of the two.
he did knock out Kaio Mashado
